sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77689" key="pantoxa/rubdis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παντο-χάρυβδις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n77689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-devouring gulf</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whirlpool</tr_>, Bgk. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ποντοχ-</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:85:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">85.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
